name: C12_13__call_add
command: When any presence sensor on the 1st floor detects presence, sound all emergency sirens for 3 seconds every minute thereafter and then turn them off.

joi.name: Scenario
joi.script:
phase := 0
if (phase == 0) {
wait until(all(#PresenceSensor #Floor1).presenceSensor_presence ==| true)
    phase = 1
    all(#Siren).siren_setSirenMode("emergency")
    all(#Siren).siren_setSirenMode("emergency_x")
    delay(3 SEC)
all(#Siren #Switch).switch_off()
}
else {
all(#Siren).siren_setSirenMode("emergency")
    delay(3 SEC)
all(#Siren #Switch).switch_off()
}

label: wrong

name: C25_3__clean
command: Every 1 minute, check the server room temperature; if it is 30 degrees or higher set the air conditioner to cool, otherwise auto. Stop after 10 times.

joi.name: Scenario

label: correct

name: C19_7__call_drop
command: Every 1 second, if the kitchen temperature is at least 32C, turn on the kitchen ventilation fan plug; otherwise if it is 28C or below, turn off the kitchen ventilation fan plug.

name: C09_14__tick_scale
